# llmstxt.codes

> AI Readiness Scanner & Web Standards Hub — check if your website is ready for AI crawlers and language models. Free scanner, generators, API, and comprehensive learning resources.

## What it does

llmstxt.codes scans any domain for four AI-relevant files (llms.txt, robots.txt, ai.txt, sitemap.xml), computes a weighted AI Readiness Score (0-100), and provides actionable improvement suggestions. Scoring v2 weights: llms.txt 44%, robots.txt 28%, sitemap 17%, ai.txt 11%.

## Tools

- [Scanner](https://llmstxt.codes/): Scan any domain for AI readiness — get a score, tier, sub-scores, and improvement suggestions
- [Playground](https://llmstxt.codes/tools/playground): Validate and preview llms.txt files in real-time
- [llms.txt Generator](https://llmstxt.codes/tools/generator/llms-txt): Generate an llms.txt file with guided form
- [robots.txt Generator](https://llmstxt.codes/tools/generator/robots-txt): Configure AI crawler access rules
- [ai.txt Generator](https://llmstxt.codes/tools/generator/ai-txt): Declare AI usage policies

## Learn

- [What is llms.txt? Complete Guide](https://llmstxt.codes/learn/llms-txt): The definitive guide — spec, real-world examples (Anthropic, Stripe, Cloudflare), best practices, FAQ, and implementation checklist
- [robots.txt and AI: Complete Guide](https://llmstxt.codes/learn/robots-txt): AI crawler list (18 bots), directive reference, training vs browsing distinction, configuration patterns, FAQ
- [What is ai.txt? Complete Guide](https://llmstxt.codes/learn/ai-txt): Emerging AI usage policy standard — format spec, real examples (news, OSS, e-commerce), comparison with TDM headers, adoption status, FAQ
- [Sitemaps and AI: Complete Guide](https://llmstxt.codes/learn/sitemap): AI-specific sitemap strategies, full XML spec, framework integration (Astro, Next.js, Nuxt, SvelteKit, +8 more), validation, FAQ

## API

- [API Reference](https://llmstxt.codes/docs/api): Free REST API — scan, score, badge, fetch, and save endpoints. No auth required. CORS enabled. Includes curl, JavaScript, and Python examples, plus CI/CD integration guide.

## About

- [About](https://llmstxt.codes/about): Mission, scoring methodology (v2 weights), tier system, privacy policy, roadmap, and tech stack
